human_intervention_points: Review packet.definition.json and packet.definition.md for semantic correctness
Issue packet.approval.json with a human approval verdict before any realization
Reapprove after any semantic drift in the approval basis
promotion_constraints: No promotion from definition review to realization without approval
No closure without realization through scm.pattern
notes: This binding limits the packet to the local scm.pattern definition-review route and does not authorize implementation.
